title: Podman cross platfrom build to amd64 on Mac M1 got Curl error (35): SSL connect error
body:
### Issue Description

I use Mac M1 and tried to build amd64 images. I got Curl error (35): SSL connect error .... [error:0407008A:rsa routines:RSA_padding_check_PKCS1_type_1:invalid padding]

Dockerfile to reproduce this issue
```
FROM registry.access.redhat.com/ubi8/ubi:latest
RUN dnf -y install git 
```
run `podman buildx build --platform=linux/amd64 -t test -f Dockerfile`

output is:
```
STEP 1/2: FROM registry.access.redhat.com/ubi8/ubi:latest
Trying to pull registry.access.redhat.com/ubi8/ubi:latest...
Getting image source signatures
Checking if image destination supports signatures
Copying blob sha256:6208c5a2e205726f3a2cd42a392c5e4f05256850d13197a711000c4021ede87b
Copying config sha256:768688a189716f9aef8d33a9eef4209f57dc2e66e9cb5fc3b8862940f314b9bc
Writing manifest to image destination
Storing signatures
STEP 2/2: RUN dnf -y install git
Updating Subscription Management repositories.
Unable to read consumer identity

This system is not registered with an entitlement server. You can use subscription-manager to register.

Red Hat Universal Base Image 8 (RPMs) - BaseOS  0.0  B/s |   0  B     00:00    
Errors during downloading metadata for repository 'ubi-8-baseos-rpms':
  - Curl error (35): SSL connect error for https://cdn-ubi.redhat.com/content/public/ubi/dist/ubi8/8/x86_64/baseos/os/repodata/repomd.xml [error:0407008A:rsa routines:RSA_padding_check_PKCS1_type_1:invalid padding]
Error: Failed to download metadata for repo 'ubi-8-baseos-rpms': Cannot download repomd.xml: Cannot download repodata/repomd.xml: All mirrors were tried
Error: building at STEP "RUN dnf -y install git": while running runtime: exit status 1
```

registry.access.redhat.com/ubi8/ubi:latest has been pulled to my local host. I tried the following 
```
% podman run -it --rm registry.access.redhat.com/ubi8/ubi:latest bash
WARNING: image platform (linux/amd64) does not match the expected platform (linux/arm64)
[root@e5b06cabe35b /]# uname -m
x86_64
[root@e5b06cabe35b /]# dnf -y install git
Updating Subscription Management repositories.
Unable to read consumer identity

This system is not registered with an entitlement server. You can use subscription-manager to register.

Red Hat Universal Base Image 8 (RPMs) - BaseOS                                                                                                          0.0  B/s |   0  B     00:00    
Errors during downloading metadata for repository 'ubi-8-baseos-rpms':
  - Curl error (35): SSL connect error for https://cdn-ubi.redhat.com/content/public/ubi/dist/ubi8/8/x86_64/baseos/os/repodata/repomd.xml [error:0407008A:rsa routines:RSA_padding_check_PKCS1_type_1:invalid padding]
Error: Failed to download metadata for repo 'ubi-8-baseos-rpms': Cannot download repomd.xml: Cannot download repodata/repomd.xml: All mirrors were tried
```

If I deleted the local registry.access.redhat.com/ubi8/ubi:latest and pulled the arm64 image, no issues
```
% podman run -it --rm registry.access.redhat.com/ubi8/ubi:latest bash
Trying to pull registry.access.redhat.com/ubi8/ubi:latest...
Getting image source signatures
Checking if image destination supports signatures
Copying blob sha256:0abb68531ec6cd91f887b3384722ee0c64e3412cddfaa0e16f33bd4ec53cbd0f
Copying config sha256:f867900263f9f313ff5f796da097647e93c37adeba9833133ea0955e3edbf3e8
Writing manifest to image destination
Storing signatures
[root@cf5e2c31a5ab /]# uname -m
aarch64
[root@cf5e2c31a5ab /]# dnf -y install git
Updating Subscription Management repositories.
Unable to read consumer identity

This system is not registered with an entitlement server. You can use subscription-manager to register.

Red Hat Universal Base Image 8 (RPMs) - BaseOS                                                                                                          811 kB/s | 609 kB     00:00    
Red Hat Universal Base Image 8 (RPMs) - AppStream                                                                                                       6.2 MB/s | 2.9 MB     00:00    
Red Hat Universal Base Image 8 (RPMs) - CodeReady Builder                                                                                               141 kB/s |  24 kB     00:00    
Dependencies resolved.
.....
```

I tried to install qemu-user-static, but still got the same error.
`podman machine ssh sudo rpm-ostree install qemu-user-static`
`podman machine ssh sudo systemctl reboot`

In short, the issue happens when the container arch is amd64, but the host arch is arm64 (M1)

### Steps to reproduce the issue

Steps to reproduce the issue
1. Host machine is Mac M1
2. create Dockerfile with content 
```
FROM registry.access.redhat.com/ubi8/ubi:latest
RUN dnf -y install git
```
3. run `podman buildx build --platform=linux/amd64 -t test -f Dockerfile`
4. get Curl error (35): SSL connect error



### Describe the results you received

STEP 1/2: FROM registry.access.redhat.com/ubi8/ubi:latest
Trying to pull registry.access.redhat.com/ubi8/ubi:latest...
Getting image source signatures
Checking if image destination supports signatures
Copying blob sha256:6208c5a2e205726f3a2cd42a392c5e4f05256850d13197a711000c4021ede87b
Copying config sha256:768688a189716f9aef8d33a9eef4209f57dc2e66e9cb5fc3b8862940f314b9bc
Writing manifest to image destination
Storing signatures
STEP 2/2: RUN dnf -y install git
Updating Subscription Management repositories.
Unable to read consumer identity

This system is not registered with an entitlement server. You can use subscription-manager to register.

Red Hat Universal Base Image 8 (RPMs) - BaseOS  0.0  B/s |   0  B     00:00    
Errors during downloading metadata for repository 'ubi-8-baseos-rpms':
  - Curl error (35): SSL connect error for https://cdn-ubi.redhat.com/content/public/ubi/dist/ubi8/8/x86_64/baseos/os/repodata/repomd.xml [error:0407008A:rsa routines:RSA_padding_check_PKCS1_type_1:invalid padding]
Error: Failed to download metadata for repo 'ubi-8-baseos-rpms': Cannot download repomd.xml: Cannot download repodata/repomd.xml: All mirrors were tried
Error: building at STEP "RUN dnf -y install git": while running runtime: exit status 1


### Describe the results you expected

The git is installed without error and the amd64 image is created

### Podman in a container

No

### Privileged Or Rootless

Rootless

### Upstream Latest Release

Yes

### Additional environment details

Additional environment details

### Additional information

Additional information like issue happens only occasionally or issue happens with a particular architecture or on a particular setting

comments.body: see https://github.com/containers/podman/issues/18271, sounds like it is a bug in qemu-user-static

> see #18271, sounds like it is a bug in qemu-user-static

as mentioned in the above issue, `podman machine init --image-path stable` fixed my issue
